name: Golf Spot 29
about: Golf Spot 29 is a comprehensive golf training and entertainment venue featuring both a driving range and indoor golf simulators. The facility utilizes Trackman radar technology for precise ball and club tracking, offering a year-round practice environment with weather-protected hitting bays. It provides services for golfers of all ages and skill levels, including individualized coaching, club fittings, and a pro shop. The venue also hosts group events, parties, and camps through its Irish Golf Academy partnership.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium Trackman radar technology for accurate swing analysis
Year-round practice with weather-protected hitting bays and simulators
Individualized coaching from Irish Golf Academy professionals

food_and_drink.notes: No bar mentioned; BYOB policy not specified.

simulator_hardware.notes: Indoor Trackman Simulators used for rental and lessons

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The content mentions club fittings and a pro shop, suggesting you can rent clubs or get fitted for new ones, but doesn't explicitly state club rental availability.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No information is provided regarding outside food or drinks. There is no mention of an on-site kitchen or bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: With Trackman technology, golfers can play 18 holes in approximately two hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers junior memberships, camps, and is described as suitable for golfers of all ages, including kids and youth.
